response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in enterprise cloud AI deployments — his resume emphasizes diverse tools and open-source projects over enterprise GenAI delivery.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack versatility with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS)
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in production systems
8+ years of AI solution experience is not clearly demonstrated — roles are broad and mixed with non-AI work
Lack of demonstrated experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Lack of Proven GenAI Production Experience
